calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2022 Vacated

Motion Of Defendant, Maria Majda, D.D.S. To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiffs Attorney In The Amount Of $1,815.00
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MARIA MAJDA, D.D.S.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, Sets One; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff's Attorney In The Amount Of $1,815.00.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MARIA MAJADA D.D.S.' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLAINT RESPONSES TO THE FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AS WELL AS CODE COMPLAINT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS..
(2) WITHIN THIRTY (30) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT COPIES OF THE DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO THE REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS.
(3) WITH TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY TO DEFENDANT AND HER COUNSEL THE SUM OF $1,000.00 AS MONETARY SANCTIONS.
(4) PLAINTIFF IS ADVISED THAT IF HE FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE PROVISIONS OF PARAGRAPHS (1) & (2) OF THIS ORDER THAT HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS DISMISSING HIS COMPLAINT WITH PREJUDICE.
COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORD FORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com).

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne: Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
